vuMailKit - Support

If you need support with vuMailKit, please contact us using the Clarion ProSeries contact form:

http://clarionproseries.com/html/contact.php

Include the product name, product version, your version of Clarion, your Windows version, and a clear description of the problem.

If your question relates to licensing, autodetect, OAuth, or managed profiles, include as many details as you can about what you tested and what return codes or messages you received.

Note: We answer contacts promptly, and our web form helps keep messages from being lost in a spam filter.

If more than 24 hours goes by and you have not heard back from us, it is possible that your ISP is blocking our email replies.

If you suspect this is the case, contact us again using another email address.

For the most up-to-date documentation, visit:

  • https://clarionproseries.github.io/docs/vuMailKit/

If the link above does not open in your help viewer, copy and paste this URL into your browser:

https://clarionproseries.github.io/docs/vuMailKit/
